mapper.sql: select id, task_id, bid_id, outline_id, content_id, item_id, issue_type, severity, issue_title, issue_desc, suggestion, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from tdw_quality_result
mapper.insert: insert into tdw_quality_result(task_id, bid_id, outline_id, content_id, item_id, issue_type, severity, issue_title, issue_desc, suggestion, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag) values(#{taskId}, #{bidId}, #{outlineId}, #{contentId}, #{itemId}, #{issueType}, #{severity}, #{issueTitle}, #{issueDesc}, #{suggestion}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag})

insert into tdw_quality_result(task_id, bid_id, outline_id, content_id, item_id, issue_type, severity, issue_title, issue_desc, suggestion, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag) values
(#{item.taskId}, #{item.bidId}, #{item.outlineId}, #{item.contentId}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.issueType}, #{item.severity}, #{item.issueTitle}, #{item.issueDesc}, #{item.suggestion}, #{item.status}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.remark}, #{item.delFlag})
mapper.delete:
delete from tdw_quality_result where task_id in
#{id}
